ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By pushing this button you can trigger the indexing on folders match your include/exclude criterias currently set.
ast.target: 点击此按钮可触发对符合当前包含/排除条件的文件夹进行索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This enables you to only show the files without path and '.md' ending in preview mode.
ast.target: 启用此选项后，预览模式下将仅显示不带路径和“.md”后缀的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the order of the links to be sorted in the index files.
ast.target: 选择索引文件中链接的排序顺序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the style of the index-list.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you enable this, the plugin will embed the sub-index content in preview mode.
ast.target: 如果启用此选项，插件将在预览模式下嵌入子索引内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Per default the file is named after your folder, but you can prefix it here.
ast.target: 默认情况下，文件以您的文件夹命名，但您可以在此处添加前缀。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set your template file's absolute path like "templates/zoottel_template.md"
ast.target: 设置模板文件的绝对路径，例如 \"templates/zoottel_template.md\"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: It specifies the separator string generated before and after the frontmatter, by default its ---
ast.target: 指定在 frontmatter 前后生成的分隔符字符串，默认为 ---

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can add Meta Tags at the top of your index-file. This is useful when you're using the index files as MOCs.
ast.target: 您可以在索引文件顶部添加元标签。当您将索引文件用作 MOC 时，这很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can add one or multiple tags to your index-files! There is no need to use "#", just use the exact value of the tags' separator specified below between the tags.
ast.target: 您可以为索引文件添加一个或多个标签！无需使用 \"#\"，只需在标签之间使用下面指定的标签分隔符的确切值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please specify the label of the tags in frontmatter (the text before the colon ):
ast.target: 请指定 frontmatter 中标签的标签（冒号前的文本）：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please specify the separator characters that distinguish the tags in Frontmatter:
ast.target: 请指定 frontmatter 中区分标签的分隔符字符：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you enable this, the plugin will put square brackets around the tags set.
ast.target: 如果启用此选项，插件将在标签集周围添加方括号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can set an emoji at the beginning of each index item depending on its type (file or folder). If multiple emojis matches, the first one will be stored.
ast.target: 您可以根据索引项的类型（文件或文件夹）在开头设置一个表情符号。如果有多个表情符号匹配，则存储第一个。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 为文件夹设置表情符号：

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在预览中嵌入子索引内容

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Set the tag's label in frontmatter
ast.target: 在前置元数据中设置标签的标签名

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Set the tag's separator in Frontmatter
ast.target: 在前置元数据中设置标签的分隔符

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add square brackets around each tags
ast.target: 在每个标签周围添加方括号

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Error during deletion/creation of index files
ast.target: 删除/创建索引文件时出错
